LAW AND MOTION 302, CYPRESS PRIVATE SECURITY LP'S DEMURRER OR PLEA IN ABATEMENT TO ALL FIVE CAUSES OF ACTION IN THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. PENDING RESOLUTION OF THE COORDINATED PUTATIVE CLASS ACTIONS IN LOS ANGELES SUPERIOR COURT OR FURTHER ORDER OF THIS COURT, THIS CASE IS STAYED BASED ON THE DOCTRINE OF EXCLUSIVE CONCURRENT JURISDICTION. ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M.GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600, TORREANOM@AOL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/HK)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-31-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Victoria Rivapalacio, Esq, 858-952-0352 of Blumenthal Nordehaug & Bhovmik for Plaintiff through Court Call.
Jaemin Chan, Esq. 415-364-5540 of Fox Rothschild LLP for Defendant Cypress Security.

RULING - A R G U E D. Defendant to email future dates to Plaintiff re: Los Angeles case. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT CYPRESS PRIVATE SECURITY LP'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CLASS ACTION COMPLAINT.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Defendant Cypress Private Security LP's demurrer or plea in abatement to all five causes of action in the first amended complaint is granted. Pending resolution of the coordinated putative class actions in Los Angeles Superior Court or further order of this court, this case is stayed based on the doctrine of exclusive concurrent jurisdiction. The coordinated Los Angeles putative class actions, which were filed before this action, raise the same claims as this putative class action. A stay is necessary to prevent duplicative work and possible inconsistent rulings. Gregg v. Sup. Crt. (1987) 194 Cal.App.3d 134 and Farmland Irrigation Co. v. Dopplmaier (1957) 48 Cal.2d 208 are distinguishable as they did not involve two California state court actions.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
